name: Smart Cache Pro
description: Automatic RTK-style compression of verbose tool output + deterministic pre-compaction snapshot. By Rin.

minLines.description: Only compress tool output with at least this many lines.

teeDir.description: Where full outputs are saved before compression. Default: <workspace>/memory/cache/tee

denyTools.description: Tool names to never compress (e.g. tools whose output must stay verbatim).
